subject: Replace expiring AAF cert
commit_message:
Replace expiring AAF cert

Issue-ID: AAI-2842
Change-Id: I9c55ea4c472692bf3c335f277ff78834831c842b
Signed-off-by: Jimmy Forsyth <jf2512@att.com>

entries.message:
Patch Set 1:

Gitlab controller: Deployment put on queue, number 9 on the queue.

Patch Set 1: Verified+1

Build Successful

Logs: https://logs.onap.org/production/vex-yul-ecomp-jenkins-1/aai-oom-master-verify-external-helm/140

Search-data has a problem unrelated to this change, debugging separately.

Certificate:
    Data:
        Version: 3 (0x2)
        Serial Number: 3274081232398955385 (0x2d6fdf88b6e9b379)
        Signature Algorithm: sha256WithRSAEncryption
        Issuer: C = US, O = ONAP, OU = OSAAF, CN = intermediateCA_9
        Validity
            Not Before: Mar 17 20:28:56 2020 GMT
            Not After : Mar 17 20:28:56 2021 GMT


We are not going to wait for gating, this will block everyone since the existing certificate expires tomorrow.

Patch Set 1:

Demonstrating the the core service is working as expected integrated with AAF:

bash-4.4$ curl -k -H "X-TransactionId: 00099" -H "X-FromAppId: jimmy-curl" -H "Accept: application/json" https://[snip]@localhost:8447/aai/v19/service-design-and-creation/models
{"model":[{"model-invariant-id":"245cf4b0-7cc5-4eea-bbd9-753e939adcab","model-type":"widget","resource-version":"1584107648652"},

Patch Set 1: Code-Review-1

Please document hardcoded secrets in oom doc

Patch Set 1:

> Patch Set 1: Code-Review-1
> 
> Please document hardcoded secrets in oom doc

I promise to do it, can you please give us a +1 so we can merge this before it expires in a few hours?

Patch Set 1: -Code-Review

Ok I count on you and I take off my -1 but please wait for gating results. The queue seems to be long so probably @Sylvain will need to check the results in the morning European Time
